app.name: Coinzy
app.description: Coinzy uses advanced AI to identify coins from around the world. Scan any coin, explore its history, rarity, and estimated value. Build your collection and trade on the marketplace.

features.title: AI Coin Scanner
features.description: Point your camera at any coin for instant identification.

features.title: Rich History
features.description: Explore detailed historical data, minting info, and rarity.

features.title: Marketplace
features.description: Buy and sell coins in a trusted community marketplace.

features.title: Rarity Analysis
features.description: Get estimated value and rarity classification instantly.

showcase.title: Marketplace
showcase.description: Buy and sell coins with collectors

showcase.title: Collection Tracking
showcase.description: Organize and manage your coin collection

showcase.title: Coin Value Insights
showcase.description: Know the real value of your coins

showcase.title: 250K+ Coins Database
showcase.description: Explore a massive global coin catalog
